title: 2021-2026 Toyota Sienna Power Back Door Lock Actuator Removal, Testing & Installation Instructions
description: Master Technician Viktor G shows the DIY how-to testing and replacement procedure of the rear hatch power back door trunk lock latch actuator motor.
